instagram:
Inside the Scoring Zone app: Clock Drill 🕐

Master break reading by putting from every angle around the hole.

1️⃣ Set up the clock — place balls at 3, 6, 9, and 12 o'clock, 6ft from the hole
2️⃣ Putt all 4 positions — read the break from each angle, adjust aim and speed
3️⃣ Score & advance — make 3/4 to pass, 4/4 = Under 3 HCP level

Benchmarks: 4/4 Tour Pro · 3/4 Under 5 · 2/4 Under 10

55 XP per completion. 10 minutes. Every angle mastered.

🎯 Free → scoringzone.net

facebook:
The Clock Drill: master break reading from every angle.

How it works in Scoring Zone:

1. Place balls at 3, 6, 9, and 12 o'clock — all 6 feet from the hole
2. Putt from each position — different break at every angle
3. Score: make 3/4 to pass, 4/4 = Under 3 HCP level

Benchmarks:
• 4/4 = Tour Pro
• 3/4 = Under 5 HCP
• 2/4 = Under 10 HCP

10 minutes. 55 XP. Every angle mastered.

#golf #chipping #scoringzone
facebook:
One club. Every trajectory. That's how pros learned to chip.

The One-Club Wizard in Scoring Zone:

1. Pick your pitching wedge — nothing else
2. Hit 10 chips to 3 different targets
3. Vary ball position to control trajectory:
   - Back in stance = low runner
   - Middle = standard chip
   - Forward = high soft landing

Score by proximity. Avg 8ft = Under 5 HCP level.
